query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as columns FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('subscriptionTiers', 'userSubscriptions') AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() GROUP BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as columns FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('subscriptionTiers', 'userSubscriptions') AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() GROUP BY TABLE_NAME;
